📋 About This Roadmap
This roadmap reflects our current development plan. Features and timelines may change as we build, test, and improve based on community feedback. We build in public — always transparent.

Mainnet launch date is TBA. We launch when the product is fully tested and ready — not before. Follow our official channels for live updates and announcements.
